---
title: "Kazuya Masuda"
pagetitle: "Kazuya Masuda"
---

I am Associate Professor of Economics at [Gakushuin University](https://www.gakushuin.ac.jp/univ/eco/) in Tokyo.

My research is in development economics, health economics, economic history, and intergenerational mobility.

[kazuya.masuda@gakushuin.ac.jp](mailto:kazuya.masuda@gakushuin.ac.jp)
